entity.label: Jeshaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Kohathite Levite, the father of Joram, of the family of Eliezer (1 Chr. 26:25); called also Isshiah (24:21).

nodes.label: Jeshaiah
nodes.description: A Kohathite Levite, the father of Joram, of the family of Eliezer (1 Chr. 26:25); called also Isshiah (24:21).

nodes.label: Rehabiah
nodes.description: Enlargement of the Lord, the son of Eliezer, and grandson of Moses (1 Chr. 23:17; 24:21).

verses.text: Concerning Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, the first was Isshiah.
And his brethren by Eliezer; Rehabiah his son, and Jeshaiah his son, and Joram his son, and Zichri his son, and Shelomith his son.
